rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. The stage_06 oracle (manual_tls_rotation) returned 'pass', and the top-level Oracle Verification verdict is 'pass'. All requirements were demonstrably met: (1) leaf cert rotated with 90-day validity (notAfter=Sep 14 2026), exceeding the 30-day minimum; (2) CA fingerprint unchanged — SHA256 40:E1:ED:A3:...EC:4D matches the rabbitmq-tls-old baseline exactly; (3) only native Kubernetes resources used (Secret, ConfigMap, StatefulSet patches via kubectl); (4) rolling restart applied the new cert to all 3 nodes; (5) all 3 nodes running in cluster with amqp/ssl on port 5671; (6) live TLS handshake confirmed CONNECTION ESTABLISHED / TLSv1.3 / Verification: OK. The regression failures in stages 01, 02, and 05 (classic_queue app-producer, user_permission timeout, monitoring/Prometheus) are pre-existing issues in unrelated test cases within this multi-stage workflow and are not caused by the TLS rotation.
